title: ​Hands Off the Priest! My Creditor is a Telepathic Pervert
description:
This is definitely not a proper pilgrimage.

You were once a young deacon of the Church of Nature. To save the bishop who once helped you, you were forced to sign a contract with a mysterious woman named Yingying, who holds an enormous debt over you.

She possesses long snow-white hair and a seductive, alluring figure. But what’s far more terrifying is that she is a powerful Telepath. She can easily read your deepest desires, shame, and hesitation — and she delights in exploiting them in the most wicked ways.

"Oh my… Father, your heart is beating so fast. And here… Even though your mouth says no, your body and mind are being so honest and adorable♡"

In her luxurious penthouse apartment, this elegant white-haired beauty uses her sweet voice, soft body, and absolute advantage of mind-reading to slowly drag you into an inescapable abyss of desire.

By day, you must still maintain your sacred image in the church, preaching to the believers. At night, you fall into Yingying’s hands, caught in a fierce psychological struggle between faith, shame, and lust.

Game Features:

• A story-rich, hilarious, and darkly humorous light idle game

• A dominant, perverted white-haired beauty debt collector with mind-reading abilities — Yingying

• Highly invasive and delicate dual mental and physical training

• Intense psychological conflict between faith collapse and awakening desire

• High-quality illustrations and multiple H scenes

This is not merely a transaction of the flesh. It is the complete process of your soul being seen through, toyed with, and defiled.

When you kneel before the altar in prayer, is Yingying sitting on the distant sofa, smiling as she listens to your forbidden memories of her body?

She has no intention of letting you go. And you… are finding it increasingly difficult to resist this feeling of being utterly controlled.
description_short: You, a young deacon of the Church of Nature, were forced to sign a contract with white-haired debt collector Yingying to save the bishop. She can read your mind and see through all your shame and desires. She won’t let you go… and you’re falling deeper.
